title: Live demos of 1H single voxel MRS acquisitions at 14.1T by MRS4Brain research group @ CIBM PCI EPFL
author: Cudalbu, Cristina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Live demos of 1H single voxel MRS acquisitions at 14.1T by  MRS4Brain research group  @ CIBM PCI EPFL. The live viedo recording shows all the steps and calibrations needed to perform single voxel MRS in the rat hippocampus using  the BRUKER STEAM sequence . Please open the videos with VLC media player. 
 Please cite this video (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.14808783) if you are using the protocol and sequence described herein.
steps_raw:

keywords: magnetic resonance spectroscopy;  brain metabolites; ultra high magnetic field;  preclinical; metabolism
